afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_RISK_ETA_BASE_PCT
afterSnapshot.description: Baseline ETA drift as a percentage of elapsed travel time, used by the per-leg risk score's ETA-uncertainty factor. Higher = the constant-speed ETA is treated as less reliable.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: The ETA-uncertainty factor needs a tunable baseline drift rate.
implementation: Matches the existing route config naming (ROUTE_*) and the config-driven scoring pattern.
